content.summary: Crazy. Sora (@soraofficialapp) We’re saying goodbye to the Sora app. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you. What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work. – The Sora Team — https://nitter.net/soraofficialapp/status/2036546752535470382#m
content.full_text:
Post title: Crazy.

Post summary: Crazy. Sora (@soraofficialapp) We’re saying goodbye to the Sora app. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you. What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work. – The Sora Team — https://nitter.net/soraofficialapp/status/2036546752535470382#m
